name: Corki

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Hextech Munitions
passive.description_source: Innate:  Corki's  basic attacks deal bonus true damage.

effects.description: Innate: Corki's basic attacks deal bonus true damage equal to 20% AD. This damage is affected by critical strike modifiers.

passive.description: Innate: Corki's basic attacks deal bonus true damage equal to 20% AD. This damage is affected by critical strike modifiers.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The mixed damage is dealt in two simultaneous instances of damage, but will pretend to be a single instance for most effects (such as Conqueror's stacks).

basic_ability_1.name: Phosphorus Bomb
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Corki fires a flash bomb at the target location, dealing magic damage to enemies hit and  revealing enemy  champions hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Corki launches a bomb at the target location that briefly grants sight of its surroundings as it travels and explodes upon impact, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.

effects.description: The bomb also grants sight of the impact area for 6 seconds and reveals enemy champions hit for the same duration.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Corki launches a bomb at the target location that briefly grants sight of its surroundings as it travels and explodes upon impact, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The missile has a minimum travel time of 0.

basic_ability_2.name: Valkyrie
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Corki  flies a short distance to the target location, dropping bombs that create a trail of fire that deals magic damage continually to enemies within.

effects.description: Active: Corki dashes to the target location and drops bombs that leave up to 3 blazing patches along his path, depending on the distance traveled. Each patch lasts 2.5 seconds.

effects.context_notes: Enemies within the patches are dealt magic damage every 0.
Enemies within the patches are dealt magic damage every 0.

effects.description: Gatling Gun can be cast during the dash.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Corki dashes to the target location and drops bombs that leave up to 3 blazing patches along his path, depending on the distance traveled. Each patch lasts 2.5 seconds.

basic_ability_3.name: Gatling Gun
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Corki's gatling gun rapidly fires in a frontal cone, continually dealing physical damage and applying  stacks of Gatling Gun to enemies hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Corki sprays bullets in a cone toward his facing direction for 4 seconds, dealing physical damage every 0.
Active: Corki sprays bullets in a cone toward his facing direction for 4 seconds, dealing physical damage every 0.
Active: Corki sprays bullets in a cone toward his facing direction for 4 seconds, dealing physical damage every 0.
Active: Corki sprays bullets in a cone toward his facing direction for 4 seconds, dealing physical damage every 0.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Corki sprays bullets in a cone toward his facing direction for 4 seconds, dealing physical damage every 0.25 seconds to all enemies hit and applying a stack to them at the same tick rate for 2 seconds, refreshing with subsequent hits and stacking up to 4 times. Each stack reduces the target's armor and magic resistance.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The maximum resistances reduction is applied after 4 ticks (1 second).

ultimate.name: Missile Barrage
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Corki fires a missile in the target direction that explodes upon the first enemy hit, dealing physical damage to enemies in an area.

effects.description: Passive: Basic attacks on-hit against champions reduce Missile Barrage's remaining recharge time by 2 : 4 (based on critical strike chance) seconds.

effects.context_notes: Active: Corki fires a missile in the target direction that explodes upon the first enemy hit, dealing physical damage to enemies within the area.

effects.description: Corki periodically stocks a Missile Barrage charge, up to a maximum of 4. He gains 2 charges upon learning the ability and maximum charges upon respawning.

effects.context_notes: Every third missile Corki fires is a Big One, dealing 100% increased damage as well as gaining increased range and explosion radius.

ultimate.description: Passive: Basic attacks on-hit against champions reduce Missile Barrage's remaining recharge time by 2 : 4 (based on critical strike chance) seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Once Corki has learned the ability: He receives a buff that counts a cycle of the number of times Missile Barrage has been used since the last Big One.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
